ddls:
CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "lead_researcher" TEXT /* Lead researcher overseeing the project */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the project */,
  "project_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the project */,
  "funding_agency" TEXT /* Funding agency supporting the project */,
  "funding_amount" REAL /* Total funding amount allocated to the project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "simulations" (
  "sim_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each simulation */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the project associated with the simulation */,
  "sim_description" TEXT /* Description of the simulation */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the simulation */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the simulation */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the simulation (e.g., running, completed) */,
  "input_parameters" TEXT /* Input parameters used for the simulation */,
  "output_format" TEXT /* Format of the output generated by the simulation */,
  "simulation_software" TEXT /* Software used to run the simulation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sim_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_simulations_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "observations" (
  "obs_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each observation */,
  "sim_id" TEXT /* Reference to the simulation from which the observation is derived */,
  "row_col" TEXT /* Row and column identifier for data organization */,
  "rot_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the rotation configuration */,
  "obs_corg" REAL /* Observation characteristics (e.g., carbon concentration) */,
  "profile" INTEGER /* Profile identifier for categorizing the observation */,
  "unit_of_measurement" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the observation (e.g., meters, degrees Celsius) */,
  "data_quality" TEXT /* Quality rating of the observation data (e.g., high, low) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("obs_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_observations_profile FOREIGN KEY ("profile") REFERENCES profiles ("profile_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_observations_sim_id FOREIGN KEY ("sim_id") REFERENCES simulations ("sim_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each result */,
  "sim_id" TEXT /* Reference to the simulation associated with the result */,
  "result_data" TEXT /* Data generated as a result of the simulation */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the result was generated */,
  "result_type" TEXT /* Type of result (e.g., graphical, numerical) */,
  "result_format" TEXT /* Format of the result (e.g., image, CSV) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_results_sim_id FOREIGN KEY ("sim_id") REFERENCES simulations ("sim_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, analyst) */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Institution affiliated with the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department within the institution */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the simulation or result */,
  "sim_id" TEXT /* ID of the simulation being accessed */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Time when the access occurred */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_mode" TEXT /* Mode of access (e.g., online, offline) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_sim_id FOREIGN KEY ("sim_id") REFERENCES simulations ("sim_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "configurations" (
  "config_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each configuration */,
  "sim_id" TEXT /* Reference to the simulation associated with the configuration */,
  "parameter_name" TEXT /* Name of the parameter being configured */,
  "parameter_value" TEXT /* Value of the parameter */,
  "config_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the configuration */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("config_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_configurations_sim_id FOREIGN KEY ("sim_id") REFERENCES simulations ("sim_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric */,
  "sim_id" TEXT /* Reference to the simulation associated with the metric */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the performance metric */,
  "metric_value" REAL /* Value of the performance metric */,
  "metric_unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the metric (e.g., seconds, megabytes) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_metrics_sim_id FOREIGN KEY ("sim_id") REFERENCES simulations ("sim_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "profiles" (
  "profile_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each profile */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the profile */,
  "profile_type" TEXT /* Type of profile (e.g., default, advanced) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("profile_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_exports" (
  "export_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each export */,
  "sim_id" TEXT /* ID of the simulation from which the data was exported */,
  "export_format" TEXT /* Format of the export (e.g., CSV, JSON) */,
  "export_date" TEXT /* Date when the export was created */,
  "export_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the export */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("export_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_exports_sim_id FOREIGN KEY ("sim_id") REFERENCES simulations ("sim_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "sim_id" TEXT /* ID of the simulation associated with the log */,
  "log_message" TEXT /* Message detailing the log event */,
  "log_date" TEXT /* Date when the log entry was created */,
  "log_level" TEXT /* Level of the log event (e.g., info, warning, error) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_logs_sim_id FOREIGN KEY ("sim_id") REFERENCES simulations ("sim_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "publications" (
  "pub_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each publication */,
  "sim_id" TEXT /* ID of the simulation associated with the publication */,
  "pub_title" TEXT /* Title of the publication */,
  "pub_date" TEXT /* Date of publication */,
  "pub_authors" TEXT /* List of authors contributing to the publication */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pub_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_publications_sim_id FOREIGN KEY ("sim_id") REFERENCES simulations ("sim_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "presentations" (
  "pres_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each presentation */,
  "sim_id" TEXT /* ID of the simulation associated with the presentation */,
  "pres_title" TEXT /* Title of the presentation */,
  "pres_date" TEXT /* Date of presentation */,
  "pres_authors" TEXT /* List of authors contributing to the presentation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pres_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_presentations_sim_id FOREIGN KEY ("sim_id") REFERENCES simulations ("sim_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "sim_id" TEXT /* ID of the simulation associated with the report */,
  "report_title" TEXT /* Title of the report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date of report generation */,
  "report_authors" TEXT /* List of authors contributing to the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_sim_id FOREIGN KEY ("sim_id") REFERENCES simulations ("sim_id")
)
